reference: My three-year-old son has had chronic constipation since birth. He has a raised C-reactive protein and raised white blood cell count. He just had an X-ray which showed a mass in his pelvis that is causing a displacement and is pushing his bowel upwards. What could this be?
text: My three-year-old son has had chronic constipation since birth. He has a raised C-reactive protein and raised white blood cell count. He just had an X-ray, which showed a mass in his pelvis that is causing a displacement and is pushing his bowel upwards. What could this be?
